creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Problem is that polkit is using the header files found in /usr/local/include/ which are those for spidermonkey17 when it is using spidermonkey170 which puts it's header files into /usr/local/include/js-17.0/. After deleting spidermonkey17, polkit installs correctly. 

I see that config.log does define pkg_cv_LIBJS_CFLAGS and LIBJS_CFLAGS with:
-include /usr/local/include/js-17.0/js/RequiredDefines.h -I/usr/local/include/js-17.0 -I/usr/local/include/nspr
but these do not appear to prevent the inclusion of the header files in /user/include.

Sorry, but my makefu is weak and I am now lost in maze of twisty Makefiles and autotools files.
